dialogos.texto_en: Wow...\nIt doesn't feel like Japan at all.\nIs this what America is like?
Hmm, I'm not sure.\nAmerica is a big place, after all.
Well, with stuff like this,\nthe atmosphere is more important\nthan being accurate, isn't it?
Exactly.\nRather than worrying about the details,\nthe one who enjoys it wins. Right, Futaro-kun?
Why are you asking me?
You probably know yourself, don't you?
Yeah, yeah, I won't say anything awkward.
What should we do, Raiha-chan?\nShould we head to the Ferris Wheel right away?
Hmm, but looking for souvenirs is important too.\nIf we have time later, maybe we can ride it.
Then how about we go at sunset?\nIt's sure to be beautiful.
That's a great idea! Nice, Itsuki!\nLet's ride in the evening, Raiha-chan.
Okay!
Ah, speaking of sunsets%p-2;――
The beach is nearby too. There's a place\ncalled Sunset Beach. As the name suggests,\nthe sunset is supposed to be beautiful there.
Wow, there's a beach nearby?\nI feel like we could spend the whole day here\njust with that.
What should we do?\nIs shopping okay for now?
Well, if we have time,\nlet's try some other things too.
Okay.
There are more shops than I thought,\nand the buildings are intricate.\nWe might get lost if we're not careful.
Yeah, if we let our guard down, we might lose Yotsuba.
It's possible.
Yotsuba, be careful, okay?
It's okay! I've got my smartphone, just in case!
You're just assuming you'll get lost.
Even though we're in the same area,\nit feels different from Kokusai dori, doesn't it?
I wonder if there are more fashion stores here.\nIf we're looking for something to wear,\nit might be easier to find it here.
Alright, let's keep going!
Y-Yotsuba?!
Oh, there's even a store that sells furniture here.
Isn't it impossible to have furniture as a souvenir?
I know that. I'm just curious, that's all.
Hmm, it mainly sells imported furniture from America.
Hey, Futaro-kun?
Yeah, what's up?
U-ummm...
Do you think new furniture would be nice? Even though\nwe share the same room, it would feel like a fresh start!\nMaybe I should rearrange my room.
Clean up your room, first.\nYou don't even have a place to put new furniture.
Ooh...!\nYou hit a sore spot.
It's not just that,\nanyone who knows your room would think the same thing.
You're right.\nI guess we should start\nby making space for the furniture.
Oh, um, by the way, Futaro-kun...
Have you thought about what you'll do after you move?
I also need to think about furniture for my room.\nWhat kind of things should I put in my apartment\nas a single person living alone?
Even though it can be difficult,\nit's also fun to spend time\nthinking about these things.
If you gradually add furniture and decor,\nit will start to feel like your own space.
Is that so?
Hmm? Isn't it?
Well, I've never had my own room before,\nso I'm not quite sure.
Oh, I see.\nWell, I think it'll be even more fun for you then.\nYou might even get unexpectedly addicted to it.
Oh, um, by the way, Futaro-kun...
Have you thought about what you'll do after you move?
American furniture, huh?\nDo you like this sort of thing, Ichika?
Oh? What's this? \nAre you curious about my tastes, Futaro-kun?
W-well, um...yeah, I am.
Teehee!\nI see. You ARE curious, then.
Well, I'll eventually tell you.\nEverything that I like, that is.
O-okay...
Wait, are you not going to tell me here and now?
It's a s-e-c-r-e-t for now.
Are you hiding something...?
Oh, um, by the way, Futaro-kun...
Have you thought about what you'll do after you move?
After I move?
It's not really anything specific!
Like, how long you plan on living alone for...?
Yeah, what's up?
Nothing!\nEven if I was to furnish my house, I don't think\nAmerican-style furniture would match very well!
Well, I'm not planning on buying any.\nI prefer something simpler.
Something simple and functional?\nThat's a fitting choice for you.
Nino? What's wrong?
Isn't Ichika being a little weird?
...I felt like something was off when she was\ntalking to Futaro.
Yeah, I was thinking the same thing.
Like, this morning she woke up earlier than me and \ngot all dressed up even though her smartphone \nalarm didn't go off.
...Really? ICHIKA?
Really. Even though she usually needs a wake-up call\nfrom Yotsuba for work.
That's not just because she's excited about the trip.\nEven if she can deceive Fu-kun,\nshe can't do the same to her sisters, you know?
What's going on? Both of you look serious.\nDid something happen?
Perfect timing, help us out too.\nAnd bring Ichika along.
Huh? Why?
It's NOTHING.
